should_trigger.prompt: Execute RED-1 and T1 from the PrismSpec plan using TDD evidence.
Implement the next incomplete task from plan.md and write task evidence.
Dispatch an isolated implementer for T2 and then review the task package.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Write an approved spec from this vague idea.
The pipeline failed but we do not know why.
should_not_trigger.reason: Debugging must prove root cause before fixes.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Run final verification and summarize evidence.

assertions: Implements one planned AC-traced slice at a time.
In TDD mode captures red and green evidence before completion.
Stops on scope drift or unexplained failures instead of guessing.
